name: motherearthradio
description: Hi Res Audio and Vinyl streaming
author: Florian Reiterer

volumio_info.details: High Resolution Radio – Mother Earth Radio is the world's first station streaming exclusively in lossless FLAC quality up to 192 kHz / 24-bit. Carefully curated classical, jazz, and instrumental music – handpicked for audiophile listeners. Hi Res Audio & Vinyl, no advertising, no compression, no compromises. Stream now.
